text:

I don't know why you think that -lintl is needed, I wouldn't have updated 
the port if it didn't build. :) 

I hate REINPLACE_CMD 

The option is a good idea, but you need to fix the plist, installation, 
etc. too. 

I'll try the -O0 thing, thanks.
